atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals bruising on the bottom and top of the right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An x-ray shows dorsal displacement of the base of the second metatarsal with a three millimeter separation of the first and second metatarsal bases and presence of bony fragments

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Surgery is likely indicated to restore proper alignment and prevent long-term complications such as arch loss, flatfoot, and arthritis

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: You will be discharged home that evening

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: You will be in a cast for six to eight weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: You will advance your ambulation gradually based on how you heal and tolerate the procedure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will see you again in twenty-four hours post-procedure
